_comment: Copy to cluster-config.json and edit. The setup script reads this on every host. All fields are optional — if missing, the script falls back to discovery (mDNS) then prompt.

controller._comment: Where MeshCentral lives. If omitted, script auto-discovers via mDNS / DNS / scan / prompt.

host._comment: Per-host overrides. If omitted, script auto-derives.

vms._comment: How many VMs to create on this host. Default 2. Each gets vm-a, vm-b naming.

network._comment: NAT switch for VMs. Picks first available /24 from this list to avoid host network collisions.

wifi._comment: Optional — only if you want the script to add a WiFi profile. If WiFi already configured on host, leave null.
